complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Install swiper@^11.2.10 with proper version constraints, 2) Audit and verify all existing dependencies are compatible with Next.js 15/TypeScript 5.7, 3) Run comprehensive build tests and resolve any version conflicts
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low complexity task involving standard dependency management. Main challenges are version compatibility verification and potential conflict resolution. Well-defined requirements with clear success criteria.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Create frontend/components/presentation/ directory structure with layouts/, components/, hooks/ subdirectories, 2) Create frontend/lib/presentation/ utilities directory, 3) Set up index.ts barrel exports for all directories, 4) Verify TypeScript path mapping and module resolution
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving file system organization and TypeScript configuration. Requires understanding of Next.js 15 conventions and proper module organization patterns. Foundation task that affects all subsequent components.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create modal UI component with glassmorphic styling, 2) Implement form controls for auto-advance, transition speed, theme selection, 3) Add localStorage persistence layer with migration handling, 4) Implement accessibility compliance including keyboard navigation and screen reader support, 5) Add form validation and error handling with user feedback
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High-medium complexity involving UI/UX design, state management, persistence, accessibility, and form validation. Requires integration with multiple systems (localStorage, theme system, accessibility APIs) and robust error handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Build base toolbar component with glassmorphic background and responsive layout, 2) Implement all control buttons (prev/next, play/pause, settings, laser pointer, speaker notes), 3) Add auto-hide functionality with inactivity detection and smooth animations, 4) Implement comprehensive keyboard accessibility and focus management, 5) Add timer display and slide counter with real-time updates, 6) Integrate with all dependent components (settings modal, speaker notes, laser pointer)
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to multiple integrations, complex interaction patterns, accessibility requirements, and animation coordination. Serves as central hub connecting many other components, requiring careful state management and event handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Modify existing share page to add presentation button with proper UI integration, 2) Create new /share/[token]/present route with Next.js App Router, 3) Implement secure token validation and blueprint data loading, 4) Add public/private presentation access controls with permission checking, 5) Implement analytics tracking for shared presentations, 6) Add comprehensive error handling for invalid tokens, missing data, and security violations
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving security considerations, new route creation, authentication/authorization, analytics integration, and error handling. Requires deep understanding of existing share system and careful security implementation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Create base PresentationMode container component structure, 2) Integrate Swiper library with custom configuration for slide navigation, 3) Implement comprehensive keyboard support (arrows, space, home, end, escape), 4) Add touch gesture handling for mobile/tablet with proper event delegation, 5) Integrate Zustand store for state management and persistence, 6) Implement React 19 concurrent features for smooth navigation, 7) Add comprehensive error boundaries and loading states
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity serving as the core orchestrator component. Requires integration of multiple external libraries, complex state management, multi-platform input handling, and React 19 concurrent features. Critical component that affects entire presentation system.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Design and implement analytics data collection system for presentation metrics, 2) Create analytics dashboard UI for presentation insights visualization, 3) Implement localStorage-based user preferences system with schema validation, 4) Add preference migration system for schema changes, 5) Implement analytics data export functionality, 6) Add privacy compliance features and user consent management
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity involving data collection, visualization, persistence, migration strategies, and privacy compliance. Requires careful consideration of data privacy laws and robust data handling patterns.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Create base resource card component with glassmorphic styling, 2) Implement responsive grid layout (1-4 columns) with proper breakpoints, 3) Add Lucide icons for different resource types with proper accessibility, 4) Implement pagination system for >8 resources with smooth transitions, 5) Add search and filter functionality within slides with debounced input and keyboard navigation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium-high complexity involving responsive design, pagination logic, search/filter functionality, and accessibility. Requires careful handling of large datasets and smooth user interactions.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Create hero title component with responsive typography using clamp() function, 2) Implement glassmorphic background with brand gradient and teal accents, 3) Add metadata cards layout for organization, role, date, duration, 4) Integrate Framer Motion animations with staggered timing and proper accessibility considerations
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity involving responsive design, brand styling, animations, and metadata display. Requires good understanding of CSS clamp(), Framer Motion, and brand design system.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: 1) Create base metrics card component with glassmorphic styling, 2) Integrate react-countup with custom animation configurations, 3) Implement responsive grid layout (1-4 columns) with proper breakpoints, 4) Add Lucide icons integration with proper accessibility and loading states, 5) Implement staggered entry animations with error handling for missing data
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium-high complexity involving animation libraries, responsive grids, accessibility for dynamic content, and error handling. Requires performance optimization for multiple animated elements and proper screen reader support.
